description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named publish that runs on pushes to main and develop branches and on pull requests to these branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for Python 3.10, checking out submodules, setting up Python, installing dependencies from requirements.txt, installing pypa/build, building a binary wheel and source tarball, and publishing the distribution to Test PyPI using a TEST_PYPI_API_TOKEN from secrets.
